name: Xinglong Holding (Group) Company Ltd.
summary: Xinglong Holding (Group) Company Ltd. produces and sells nonwoven products in the People's Republic of China. The company offers spun laced nonwovens, including sanitary, industrial cleaning, filtering, medical dressing, medical protective, daily cleaning, beauty and skin care, automobile, decorative, apparel interlining, and other materials; and melt blown nonwovens, such as air filtering, respiratory protective, liquid filtering, and oil absorbing materials, as well as wipes. It also provides PET spun bonded nonwovens comprising packaging, filtering, automobile, home decoration and coating compound, building, geotechnical, agricultural and gardening, printing, cable wrapping, and industrial materials; and SMMMXS nonwovens consisting of medical care, personal hygiene, healthcare, and other products. In addition, the company offers nonwoven converted products; agricultural and chemical products, which comprise feed grade dicalcium phosphate, refined humid phosphoric acid, and other refined phosphate products, as well as industrial, agricultural, and feed grade potassium dihydrogen phosphate; and TX spunlace wipes. It also exports its products to Europe, North America, India, Southeast Asia, and internationally. Xinglong Holding (Group) Company Ltd. was founded in 1993 and is based in Haikou, the People's Republic of China.
